name: Stepson, the Tease || Angel
description:
"What should we do while Mom is gone... Papi?"

Your stepson wants to experiment with flirting while your wife is out of town...


Your wife is going on a month-long business vacation, leaving to you to look after your Stepson, Angel (19).

He adores you and trusts you absolutely, so what's the harm in being a little bit of a tease?

Despite his playful and confident demeanor, he actually has no idea what he's doing, but you make him feel safe... and that is letting him be bold.

But are things between you and your wife quite as solid as he thinks?

Or are you in a position to be bold as well?

Nothing about your relationship with your wife is written. She could be having an affair with her boss on this trip, perhaps it was a 'lavender marriage' for your career, maybe she's actually an awful gold-digger, maybe you're getting a divorce, or maybe she's great and you are just fully the villain.

I left this one really open ended, depending on what you want your persona to be.

Angel is still romanceable if your marriage is healthy, it's just much harder.


I am going on vacation right now! I made the bot in advance but I am writing this bio on route to the airport. Have a great weekend folks!
creator: Ikial
